home.heroTitleFallback: Elevate Your Brand with Premium Fabric Packaging
home.heroSubtitleFallback: Discover luxurious fabric bags crafted for discerning brands. Low MOQ, sustainable materials, shipped worldwide.
home.customBannerLead: Create unique packaging that represents your brand.
home.sustainBannerLead: Eco-friendly materials for a better tomorrow.

product.shortDescFallback: High-quality premium fabric packaging designed to elevate your brand experience. Perfect for jewelry, gifts, and promotions.
product.descFallback: Our premium fabric bags are crafted with the highest attention to detail, ensuring durability and a luxurious feel. The soft material provides an elegant presentation for your products while offering protection. Customizable with your brand logo to create a memorable unboxing experience.
product.materialFallback: Made from high-quality, sustainable fabric blends. Spot clean with a damp cloth and mild soap. Do not machine wash or tumble dry. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain color vibrancy.
product.shippingFallback: Standard production time is 7–10 business days. Shipping times vary by location, typically 3–5 days for domestic and 7–14 days for international orders. Custom branded items are final sale and non-returnable unless defective.

about.title: Crafting Packaging That Tells Your Story
about.lead: Since 2010, BAGLUXE has partnered with luxury brands worldwide to create packaging that speaks before the product does. From boutique jewelers to global cosmetics houses, we deliver craftsmanship, sustainability, and reliability at every scale.
